name: terminal-mate
description: Custom command snippets, history, and status bar shortcuts for terminal workflows. Automate repetitive shell commands with intelligent placeholders.

title.description: Status bar button title and terminal name

reuse.description: Override terminal reuse behavior for this snippet

os.description: Limit snippet to specific operating systems (win32|darwin|linux)

terminal-mate.customTerminalsButtonLabel.description: Status Bar button label that opens the saved custom commands Quick Pick

terminal-mate.cursorSymbol.description: Marker inside snippets for manual cursor placement before finishing the command

terminal-mate.showPreviewForCustomTermin.description: Show a modal preview of the final command before running

terminal-mate.reuseTerminalByTitle.description: Reuse existing terminal windows matched by snippet title

terminal-mate.customHistorySize.description: Maximum number of executed commands to keep in history

terminal-mate.confirmDangerousCommands.description: Ask for confirmation before running git reset, clean, or force push

terminal-mate.pinLastCustomTerminal.description: Pin the most recently used command to the status bar for one-click access

terminal-mate.pinLastCustomTerminalLabel.description: Prefix used for the pinned last-command status bar button

terminal-mate.showStatusBar.description: Show the TerminalMate menu button in the status bar
